title: Off-chain JWT session token from verified handshake
description: After a successful on-chain handshake verification, emit a signed JWT containing the nullifierHash, scopeCommitment, and expiry so that LangChain/CrewAI tool chains can pass a lightweight bearer token on subsequent calls instead of re-proving. The SDK should expose `handshakeToSessionToken(proof, signingKey) → JWT` and `verifySessionToken(jwt, pubKey) → {nullifier, scope, expiry}`. This eliminates the biggest integration friction: frameworks expect sub-100ms auth checks, not 2-second proof generation on every tool invocation.
